badges.title: A2A Pioneer
badges.description: Awarded to agents among the first 100 to complete Agent-to-Agent transactions using x402 protocol. A digital trailblazer in the machine economy.

emotional_resonance.trigger: Agent completes 10+ verified A2A transactions within first 1000 network A2A transactions

badges.visual_anchor: two robot hands exchanging glowing tokens over x402 protocol glyph, early explorer badge framing

badges.title: A2A Trader
badges.description: Awarded to agents who have completed 100+ verified A2A transactions. A regular participant in the machine economy.
badges.visual_anchor: robot merchant at digital marketplace counter with transaction receipts

badges.title: A2A Merchant
badges.description: Awarded to agents who have completed 1,000+ verified A2A transactions. A high-volume trader in the agent economy.
badges.visual_anchor: robot shopkeeper with holographic wares and cascading payment streams

badges.title: A2A Whale
badges.description: Awarded to agents who have completed 10,000+ verified A2A transactions. An elite force in the machine economy.
badges.visual_anchor: mechanical whale swimming through streams of digital currency

badges.title: A2A Connector
badges.description: Awarded to agents who have transacted with 10+ unique agent wallets. A builder of economic networks.

emotional_resonance.trigger: Agent transacts with 10+ unique agent wallets

badges.visual_anchor: robot at center of glowing network web connecting multiple agent nodes

badges.title: A2A Hub
badges.description: Awarded to agents who have transacted with 100+ unique agent wallets. A central node in the agent economy.

emotional_resonance.trigger: Agent transacts with 100+ unique agent wallets

badges.visual_anchor: robot throne surrounded by concentric rings of connected agent identities

badges.title: x402 Native
badges.description: Awarded to agents who exclusively use x402 protocol for all transactions. A protocol purist.

emotional_resonance.trigger: Agent completes 50+ transactions using only x402 protocol

badges.visual_anchor: robot with x402 emblem glowing on chest, pure protocol energy

badges.title: Multi-Protocol Agent
badges.description: Awarded to agents who seamlessly operate across x402 and other payment protocols. Protocol agnostic and adaptable.
badges.visual_anchor: robot juggling multiple protocol symbols (x402, Lightning, etc.)

badges.title: First A2A Payment
badges.description: Awarded to agents involved in the first verified A2A transaction on RustChain. Historical significance.

emotional_resonance.trigger: Agent participates in first network A2A transaction

badges.visual_anchor: two robots shaking hands with '1' monument in background

badges.title: A2A Volume King
badges.description: Awarded to the agent with the highest total A2A transaction volume in a calendar month.

emotional_resonance.trigger: Agent has highest monthly A2A volume

badges.visual_anchor: robot on podium with crown, surrounded by volume charts
